context.audience: Developers building applications that process images, audio, or video with AI, product teams adding visual understanding or speech features, creative tool developers integrating generative AI
pain_points: Managing input size limits and costs for image and audio processing
Choosing between multimodal models and specialized vision/audio APIs
Building reliable pipelines for document understanding and OCR with LLMs
Handling audio transcription latency and accuracy trade-offs
Integrating image generation into production workflows with content moderation
